name: FFmpeg Tools
description: Runs reviewed local FFmpeg transforms against host-staged Canvas media without exposing native paths or a shell.

tools.title: FFmpeg · Image output
tools.description: Run FFmpeg arguments that create one image from staged Canvas media.

tools.title: FFmpeg · Video output
tools.description: Run FFmpeg arguments that create one video from staged Canvas media.

tools.title: FFmpeg · Audio output
tools.description: Run FFmpeg arguments that create one audio file from staged Canvas media.
